scaffolder.description: Scaffolds the Rakta-Vahini web app project. Handles Vite+React+TS setup, Tailwind/shadcn/ui init, Firebase SDK config, React Router wiring, and shared UI kit ported from the Android app.

feature-builder.description: Builds all pages, forms, modals, and feature screens for the Rakta-Vahini web app. Handles SearchPage, User/Hospital registration, Donors/Hospitals/History listing pages, Emergency SOS page, Certificate page, Settings, Profile Edit, detail modals, and static pages (About, Privacy, Contact). Wires everything to Firebase hooks.

map-specialist.description: Handles all Leaflet map integration and geolocation features for the Rakta-Vahini web app. Implements donor location markers, radius circle overlays, geolocation API integration ('Fetch My Live Location'), and click-to-pick location on registration forms.
